name: CLOUT
description: CLOUT is a Web3 crypto simulator game built on Roblox, powered by the Solana network. It is an open-world experience shaped by a community-driven economy where players can create, trade, and sell coins while progressing through levels, quests, and XP, and competing in tournaments to win real Solana rewards. Alongside this, major cryptocurrencies in the game follow real-world market movement, allowing players to practice trading with live price action without financial risk. CLOUT's mission is to onboard the next generation of traders by providing a safe, educational, fun, and skill-based setting where trading becomes a playable experience.
